name: Sanjay Mehrotra
aboutHeading: Eight years chasing light across six continents.
aboutParagraph1: I'm a wildlife and landscape photographer working between the field and home — currently based in [Your City]. My work centers on patience: waiting out weather, waiting on animals, waiting for the one frame that earns the trip.
aboutParagraph2: Prints, licensing, and guided photo expeditions are available on request. I travel light, shoot manual, and rarely crop.
pullQuote: The best frame is rarely the one you planned for.
